textByHashes.f93ee195eedb11c2a76cded02381d63fab8e23c9: Oh... Nilsal. Unusual to see someone up here. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.7b3e546390ba1e00452494396063869cbef51e05: I used to work downstairs... but I started using the lab after hours for my own projects and the supervisor found out. Now I've been assigned to rooftop duty to look after the plants.
textByHashes.81ad5d4fce04d7bc24615f634ec0ab5650192955: I do, but only for fellow members of the Alchemical Society. Perhaps you should join up if you're interested in Herblore.
textByHashes.88dd42327a6988b71f906410c3e245fc043c1724: Yes... Make good use of the digweed once they're ready to pick. Choose which potion you use it on wisely!
textByHashes.4be631aa1907de3ad3017cc466576c800e063df1: Oh, and the processing tables can be sped up a bit if you use them correctly. You might need to do some experimenting to figure that out.
